title: Architecture/code drift inicial
wave: Ola 4 — Repo intelligence y revisión industrial

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-38 agrega un detector local read-only sobre documentación y módulos Python existentes. No introduce dependencias externas, red, APIs, modelos, UI, sandbox, patch apply, Git write ni ejecución de código analizado. Extiende la línea Fase C ya aprobada.

pass_criteria: ArchitectureDriftDetector compares documented components against real code modules.
The command returns CommandResult and supports --json/--write-report.
Findings separate doc_missing, code_missing and name_mismatch.
The output matrix includes confidence and documented status.
planned/future/disabled components without code are not blocking.
MIASI declares repo.architecture_drift as a read-only tool.
block_criteria: The detector invents relationships not supported by path, exact name, alias or fuzzy confidence.
The detector modifies documentation or code automatically.
The detector executes/imports code under analysis.
The detector uses LLM, network or external APIs.
The detector marks planned/future components without code as BLOCK.
Patch apply, Git write, refactor execution, sandbox or deploy are enabled.
risks: Alias/fuzzy matching can produce false positives or false negatives.
The detector is not a Component Registry, SAST/SCA, runtime call graph or industrial certification.
Future evolution should add explicit architecture-code mapping contracts.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-39 — ReviewRulePacks y quality gate de revisión
